phase_1.audio: Sound level monitoring shows fluctuation from 82.5 dBA to sustained 72.5 dBA. Higher ambient noise detected; concentration requires active focus effort.
phase_1.vitals: Vitals monitoring recorded 90 bpm as session average. This deviates from ideal focus-state parameters.

phase_3.recommendations: Attempt sessions in slightly quieter locations to evaluate impact on concentration. Gradually increase session length from current 80s to develop deeper concentration habits.

reason: Score determined by comprehensive assessment: ambient noise management (72.5dB), user-state stability (settled), physiological data (available), and sustainable duration (80s).
